name: Bruschetta
method: In a small bowl, combine tomato, garlic, vinegar, olive oil, basil leaves, salt, and pepper. Cover with plastic and leave in the refrigerator for 1-3 hours. Toast bread well on both sides. Arrange bread slices on a serving platter. Spoon 1 T tomatoes on each piece of toasted bread and top with basil. You can double this recipe for four people, 2 slices each. Most of my recipes can be doubled for larger families. Serving suggestion: Serve as an aperitivo! Serves 2. Olé
